---
title: "Formulas for Turning Your Passion into a Career"
subtitle: "Albion College Gerstacker Institute 50th Anniversary Celebration"
author: "John W. Pearce, CFA"
date: 2023-11-10
categories: [Albion]
---

I was invited to speak at the Albion College Gerstacker Institute 50th Anniversary Celebration.

![Title Slide Image](formulas_titlecard.png)

# Agenda

Agenda:

-   Background
    -   About Me
    -   My Time at Albion College
    -   NorthPointe Capital and (A) Moneyball Formula
    -   IMRF and the Pension Equation
-   Three Frameworks
    -   Life on a Galton Board
    -   Quantim Theory of Wealth
    -   The Shape of \[Risk\] Stories
-   Conclusion
    -   My Formula for a Fulfilling Career?
    -   My Formula for Life?

# Resources

```{=html}

<iframe src="formulas_web.pdf" title="Embedded PDF Viewer" width="100%" height="500px">
    <p>Your browser does not support iframes. <a href="formulas_web.pdf">Download the PDF</a>.</p>
</iframe>
```
